message:
feat(membrane): harden runtime math controllers against integer overflow and add cached check orderings

Saturating arithmetic: Replace bare += with saturating_add across all
runtime math controllers (mean_field_game, rough_path, schrodinger_bridge,
bandit, primal-dual control) to prevent u64 counter wraps under sustained
load. Each controller gains a dedicated test proving the counter saturates
at u64::MAX without wrapping to zero.

Bandit router: Clamp estimated_cost_ns to i64::MAX before the latency
penalty multiply, and chain saturating_sub for the utility computation,
preventing wrap-to-positive utility on extreme cost inputs. New test
`extreme_cost_does_not_wrap_to_positive_utility` validates the fix.

Primal-dual controller: Replace fetch_add with fetch_update+saturating_add
for observed_calls, total_cost_ns, and adverse_events so all three counters
clamp at saturation. New test `observe_saturates_internal_counters` validates.

Check oracle: Add pack_ordering/unpack_ordering helpers and CheckStage::from_u8
for O(1) atomic cache of check orderings. RuntimeMathKernel gains a
cached_check_orderings array (16 slots, indexed by family*2+aligned) that
avoids locking the sampled_oracle on the hot read path. Write paths
(observe_check_oracle_outcome, report_check_outcome_standalone,
full_stack_report_with_oracle_update) refresh the cache after mutation.

Arena quarantine: Replace QUARANTINE_MAX_ENTRIES constant with dynamic
quarantine_controller::current_depth() call, unifying the entry-count
threshold with the live adaptive controller.

SOS barrier: Add compose_memory_pressure_ppm to blend depth-derived arena
pressure with live runtime pressure telemetry (surge projection). Add
beta-4 direct memory-pressure penalty to evaluate_provenance_barrier so
extreme memory pressure forces backpressure even when risk terms are mild.
Four new tests cover pressure composition, recovery, nominal false-positive
bound, and extreme-pressure provenance violation. Golden value updated
(49990 -> 30990) to reflect the added penalty term.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
